name: touchdesigner
description: TouchDesigner control via td-cli — operator/parameter editing, Python exec, screenshots, harness loop with backup/rollback.

prerequisites.name: go
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Go from https://go.dev/dl/ (needed to build td-cli — no prebuilt releases yet)

methods.name: source
methods.command: git clone https://github.com/arghhhhh/td-cli.git /tmp/td-cli-build && cd /tmp/td-cli-build && go install -ldflags "-X main.version=0.1.0-opaque" ./cmd/td-cli/ && rm -rf /tmp/td-cli-build

install.notes: Pinned to fork arghhhhh/td-cli (includes --opaque flag — PR https://github.com/0dot77/td-cli/pull/2). Revert to 0dot77/td-cli after upstream merges. TouchDesigner itself must be installed separately from https://derivative.ca/download. After install, the TDCliServer.tox component from https://github.com/arghhhhh/td-cli/tree/main/tox must be dropped into the user's TD project root and the Web Server DAT must run on port 9500.

integration_test.description: TouchDesigner must be running with TDCliServer.tox loaded and webserver1 on port 9500

TD_CLI.prompt: Path to td-cli binary (leave blank to use td-cli from PATH)

post_install_hints: 2. Drag `tox/TDCliServer.tox` from https://github.com/arghhhhh/td-cli into the root network.
3. Confirm the component is named `TDCliServer` and `webserver1` runs on port 9500.
Optional auth: set TD_CLI_TOKEN in both your shell and TD's process env for HMAC-verified requests.
